contents:
[package]
name = "relm4"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/relm4/"
version = "0.10.1"
authors = ["Aaron Erhardt <aaron.erhardt@t-online.de>"]
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.93"
readme = "README.md"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
description = "An idiomatic GUI library inspired by Elm and based on gtk4-rs"
homepage = "https://relm4.org"
repository = "https://github.com/Relm4/Relm4"
keywords = ["gui", "gtk", "gtk4", "gnome", "elm"]
categories = ["gui"]
include = ["src/", "examples/", "benches/", "tests/", "README.md", "LICENSE-MIT", "LICENSE-APACHE"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]
cargo-args = ["-Zunstable-options", "-Zrustdoc-scrape-examples"]
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[features]
default = ["css", "macros", "gnome_42"]
css = ["relm4-css"]
libadwaita = ["adw"]
libpanel = ["panel"]
macros = ["relm4-macros"]
gnome_49 = ["gnome_48", "gtk/gnome_49", "adw/v1_8"]
gnome_48 = ["gnome_47", "gtk/gnome_48", "adw/v1_7"]
gnome_47 = ["gnome_46", "gtk/gnome_47", "adw/v1_6"]
gnome_46 = ["gnome_45", "gtk/gnome_46", "adw/v1_5"]
gnome_45 = ["gnome_44", "gtk/gnome_45", "adw/v1_4"]
gnome_44 = ["gnome_43", "gtk/gnome_44", "adw/v1_3"]
gnome_43 = ["gnome_42", "gtk/gnome_43", "adw/v1_2"]
gnome_42 = ["gtk/gnome_42"]
all = ["macros", "libadwaita", "panel", "panel/v1_4"]

[dependencies]
flume = "0.12.0"
futures = "0.3.31"
fragile = "2.0.1"
once_cell = "1.21"
tracing = "0.1.44"

[dependencies.adw]
optional = true
version = "0.8.1"
package = "libadwaita"

[dependencies.gtk]
version = "0.10.3"
package = "gtk4"

[dependencies.panel]
optional = true
version = "0.6"
package = "libpanel"

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["rt", "rt-multi-thread", "sync"]
version = "1.47"

[dependencies.relm4-css]
optional = true
version = "0.10.1"
path = "./relm4-css"

[dependencies.relm4-macros]
optional = true
version = "0.10.1"
path = "./relm4-macros"

[dev-dependencies]
rand = "0.9.2"
tracker = "0.2"
reqwest = "0.12.28"
tracing-subscriber = "0.3.22"
serde_json = "1"

[dev-dependencies.relm4-macros]
version = "0.10.1"
path = "./relm4-macros"

[dev-dependencies.criterion]
default-features = false
version = "0.8"

[dev-dependencies.relm4-components]
path = "./relm4-components"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["rt", "macros", "time", "rt-multi-thread"]
version = "1.47"

[dev-dependencies.serde]
features = ["derive", "default"]
version = "1"

[[bench]]
name = "stress_test"
harness = false

[[example]]
name = "simple"
path = "examples/simple.rs"
doc-scrape-examples = true

[[example]]
name = "leaflet_sidebar"
path = "examples/leaflet_sidebar.rs"
required-features = ["libadwaita"]

[[example]]
name = "tab_factory"
path = "examples/tab_factory.rs"
required-features = ["libadwaita"]

[[example]]
name = "tab_game"
path = "examples/tab_game.rs"
required-features = ["libadwaita"]

[[example]]
name = "toast"
path = "examples/toast.rs"
required-features = ["libadwaita", "gnome_43"]

[[example]]
name = "split_layout"
path = "examples/split_layout.rs"
required-features = ["libadwaita", "gnome_45"]

[[example]]
name = "navigation_splitview_with_stack"
path = "examples/navigation_splitview_with_stack.rs"
required-features = ["libadwaita", "gnome_45"]

[[example]]
name = "message_from_grid_view"
path = "examples/message_from_grid_view.rs"
required-features = ["gtk/v4_12"]

[package]
name = "relm4-components"
readme = "README.md"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/relm4_components/"
version = "0.10.1"
authors = ["Aaron Erhardt <aaron.erhardt@t-online.de>"]
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.93"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
description = "An idiomatic GUI library inspired by Elm and based on gtk4-rs"
homepage = "https://relm4.org"
repository = "https://github.com/Relm4/Relm4"
keywords = ["gui", "gtk", "gtk4", "gnome", "elm"]
categories = ["gui"]
include = ["src/", "examples/", "README.md", "LICENSE-MIT", "LICENSE-APACHE"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]
cargo-args = ["-Zunstable-options", "-Zrustdoc-scrape-examples"]

[dependencies]
once_cell = "1.21"
tracker = "0.2"

[dependencies.relm4]
default-features = false
features = ["css", "macros"]
version = "0.10.1"
path = "./relm4"

[dependencies.reqwest]
optional = true
version = "0.12.28"

[features]
default = []
web = ["reqwest"]
libadwaita = ["relm4/libadwaita"]

[[example]]
name = "web_image"
required-features = ["web"]

[[example]]
name = "adw_combo_row"
required-features = ["libadwaita"]

[package]
name = "relm4-css"
readme = "README.md"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/relm4_css/"
version = "0.10.1"
authors = ["Aaron Erhardt <aaron.erhardt@t-online.de>"]
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.93"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
description = "An idiomatic GUI library inspired by Elm and based on gtk4-rs"
homepage = "https://relm4.org"
repository = "https://github.com/Relm4/Relm4"
keywords = ["gui", "gtk", "gtk4", "gnome", "elm"]
categories = ["gui"]
include = ["src/", "build.rs", "README.md", "LICENSE-MIT", "LICENSE-APACHE"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]
cargo-args = ["-Zunstable-options", "-Zrustdoc-scrape-examples"]

[package]
name = "relm4-macros"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["gui", "gtk", "gtk4", "elm", "view"]
documentation = "https://docs.rs/relm4_macros/"
version = "0.10.1"
authors = ["Aaron Erhardt <aaron.erhardt@t-online.de>"]
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.93"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
description = "An idiomatic GUI library inspired by Elm and based on gtk4-rs"
homepage = "https://relm4.org"
repository = "https://github.com/Relm4/Relm4"
categories = ["gui"]
include = ["src/", "tests/", "README.md", "LICENSE-MIT", "LICENSE-APACHE"]

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[features]
default = ["relm4"]
relm4 = []

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1.0"
quote = "1.0"

[dependencies.syn]
features = ["full", "extra-traits", "visit", "visit-mut"]
version = "2.0"

[dev-dependencies]
rustversion = "1"
trybuild = "1.0.116"

[dev-dependencies.relm4]
version = "0.10.1"
path = "./relm4"
default-features = false
